creator: dan@langille.org
text:
Vulnerabilities have been found.  Upgrade is strongly recommended.

- http://www.mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=14340
- http://www.mantisbt.org/bugs/view.php?id=14016

Fix: NOTE to committer: I was unable to fix this deinstall issue.  If you know how to adjust my patch below,
please do so.  :)

A vuln.xml update will follow.

# make deinstall
===>  Deinstalling for databases/mantis
===>   Deinstalling mantis-1.2.11
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide/en/build' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide/en/build'
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide/en' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide/en'
pkg_delete: file '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide' doesn't exist
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/www/mantis/docbook/adminguide'
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is
incorrectly specified?)
